Title: Dispute De-Escalator · Gemini 3 Hackathon Submission
Description: Built an AI pre-court dispute resolution tool for the Gemini 3 Hackathon using Gemini agentic NLP to sanitise emotionally charged inputs, identify core legal issues, and generate structured de-escalation reasoning, delivering a working prototype addressing judicial backlog — a real institutional problem at scale in India.

Title: RiceAgent
Description: Engineered an offline-first mobile app for rural agricultural data collection using Flutter and SQLite/Hive with background sync architecture, solving the specific challenge of reliable data capture in zero-connectivity environments common across rural India.

Title: Flip Wars
Description: Built a game-theory strategy game with a high-performance AI opponent using Java, JavaFX, memoization, and transposition tables with an async 10-second turn counter, demonstrating advanced algorithmic thinking and asynchronous programming for course project

Title: ExecuCode
Description: Built a multi-objective code grading environment for the Scaler OpenEnv Hackathon. Features a FastAPI server, interactive dashboard, and Gemini-powered autonomous agent loops to grade Python submissions across correctness, performance, and code quality using deterministic test execution and AST complexity analysis.
